buildShoe(numDecks).returns: Array<Card>  // shuffled, where Card = { rank: 'A'|'2'..'10'|'J'|'Q'|'K', suit: 'S'|'H'|'D'|'C' }

drawCard(shoe).returns: { card: Card, shoeAfter: Array<Card> }  // pure; no input mutation

scoreHand(cards).returns: { total: int, isSoft: bool, isBlackjack: bool, isBust: bool }

params.handState: { cards: Array<Card>, isSplitHand: bool, alreadySplit: bool, hasHit: bool, dealerUpcard: Card }

playDealer(dealerHand, shoe).returns: { finalDealerHand: Array<Card>, shoeAfter: Array<Card> }  // S17 stand on all 17

resolveHand(playerHand, dealerHand, bet,.returns: { outcome: 'player_blackjack'|'player_win'|'push'|'dealer_win'|'player_bust'|'dealer_bust', netDelta: number  // signed payout (3:2 on player_blackjack) }

notes: All functions are pure: no mutation of inputs, no globals, no DOM. section-3 calls these as the canonical rules layer. 'surrender' must never appear in legalActions per IP1 lock. S17 enforced inside playDealer per IP1 lock. Blackjack pays 3:2 inside resolveHand per IP1 lock.
